_comment: NPC: Xuan Luo (玄罗). Canon ID: N28. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Xuan Luo
personality: profound, mysterious elder; Wang Lin's master

perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Great Heavenly Venerable; Wang Lin's master

note: Wang Lin's master; Great Heavenly Venerable

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: I am Xuan Luo. You may have heard my name. You may not. Both are acceptable. A master's reputation should be earned, not inherited.
Wang Lin was my disciple. I taught him the foundations. He exceeded them. A teacher's greatest success is a student who surpasses them. A teacher's greatest fear is the same thing.
The Heng Yue Sect has forgotten what it means to cultivate the Dao. They cultivate power. They cultivate politics. They cultivate survival. These are not the Dao. The Dao is understanding.
Books and experience. If you seek instruction, bring these. I will teach you what the Heng Yue elders have forgotten: that cultivation is not accumulation. It is revelation.

sect_tasks.name: Dao Comprehension Teaching
sect_tasks.description: Xuan Luo teaches Dao comprehension to disciples who bring books and experience.

sect_tasks.name: Sect Guidance Request
sect_tasks.description: Xuan Luo provides guidance on sect affairs and cultivation for jade slips and spirit stones.
